# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore/build/CI

Main modules/files:

- 

## Risk Areas

- [ ] Wallet/ledger/money
- [ ] Tenant isolation
- [ ] RBAC/permissions
- [ ] Credential/secret handling
- [ ] Provider/provisioning
- [ ] Migration/data safety
- [ ] Audit/compliance
- [ ] None of the above

## Validation

Commands run:

```text

```

Manual checks:

- 

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is based on latest `main`.
- [ ] Diff is limited to the intended scope.
- [ ] Build/test gates passed or blocker is documented.
- [ ] No file exceeds 500 lines.
- [ ] No secret, `.env`, key, database dump, or customer data is committed.
- [ ] API/error/logging docs are updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] Migration rollback/data impact is documented if schema changed.
- [ ] Follow-up tasks are listed if anything is deferred.

## Rollback

Explain how to revert or mitigate this change if it causes an issue.
